creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
I am sorry, but this is taking longer than I expected: I am having some technical issues testing the patch (issues not related to the patch). Hopefully I will solve them soon. I have not forgotten about your work Henrik, don't worry.

By the way, I noticed you put twice science/hdf5 in LIB_DEPENDS. I don't see duplicate dependencies usually in ports, so I am unsure this is is needed. Is there any special reason for this?

Thanks.
